steps.title: Clear the equations
steps.content: The first equation simplifies to $7x-18y=-\frac{40}{7}$. The second equation simplifies to $7x-4py=12$. For no solution, the coefficient pairs must be proportional and the constants must be different.

steps.title: Match the y-coefficients
steps.content: The $x$-coefficients are both $7$, so the scale factor is $1$. Match the $y$-coefficients: $$-18=-4p$$ Divide by $-4$: $$p=\frac{18}{4}=\frac{9}{2}=4.5$$

steps.title: Confirm no solution
steps.content: With $p=4.5$, both equations have the same left side, $7x-18y$, but their constants are $-\frac{40}{7}$ and $12$. The lines are parallel and distinct, so the system has no solution. The answer is 4.5.
